# ASAP Pest and Wildlife Removal

## Business
Humane, eco-friendly wildlife removal and pest control serving Metro Atlanta and surrounding areas. Family-run. Licensed by Georgia DNR, Department of Agriculture, and State of Georgia. Available 24 hours a day, Monday through Saturday.

## Contact
- Phone: (770) 691-3636
- Email: info@wildliferemovalasap.com
- Address: 2990 Pine Canyon Dr. SW Unit 11, Atlanta, GA 30331
- Hours: 24 hours Monday-Saturday; closed Sunday
- Booking: https://cal-asap.buildwisemedia.com/asap-pest-wildlife/consultation

## Services
- Wildlife Removal: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/wildlife-removal.html — Humane trapping and removal of raccoons, squirrels, bats, snakes, opossums, birds. $200-$600.
- Pest Control: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/pest-control.html — Eco-friendly pest control for rodents, insects, general pests. $100-$400.
- Exclusion & Sealing: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/exclusion.html — Entry point sealing with warranty. $750-$2,000.
- Disinfection & Cleanup: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/disinfection.html — Attic and crawl space cleanup, droppings removal, disinfection. $500-$3,000.
- Dead Animal Removal: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/dead-animal-removal.html — Removal, disposal, odor elimination. $150-$500.
- Commercial Services: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/services/commercial.html — Ongoing pest and wildlife management for businesses. $200-$2,000.
- Full Exclusion Package: Inspection + trapping + sealing + disinfection. $750-$5,000+.

## Process
Four-step complete solution: Inspect, Trap, Exclude, Disinfect. Most competitors only trap and leave — ASAP seals all entry points and disinfects affected areas.

## Pricing
- Initial inspection fee credited toward service if customer proceeds
- Multiple price options (good/better/best) for repair work
- Month-to-month, no long-term lock-in
- Exclusion warranty included

## Service Area
Metro Atlanta and surrounding counties, Georgia.

## Certifications
- Georgia DNR Wildlife License
- Georgia Department of Agriculture License
- State of Georgia Business License

## Reviews
5.0 stars, 100+ reviews across Google, HomeAdvisor, Yelp, and Nextdoor.
